violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the front service area was lacking paper towels. PIC provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025

The hand-washing sink in the front service area was blocked by an ice bucket. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. PIC removed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Ice scoop was stored on top of a box. Items brought to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025
Prep unit door gaskets were observed in poor repair. PIC stated a work order is in place. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025
The pipes of the walk-in freezer condenser are in poor repair. Inspector observed cracked insulation/pipe and ice accumulation. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025
The hand-washing sink in the front service area was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024

Food contact surfaces of the ice machines were observed with an accumulation of biofilm and soil residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machines were taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized, and bagged ice used. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024
The ice bucket was not stored inverted. Water observed inside ice bucket. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024

The floors including inside the walk in cooler and freezer have an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024
